scripts.verify-build: node -e "console.log('Build verification: checking if dist folder exists and has content...'); const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const distPath = path.join(__dirname, 'dist'); if (fs.existsSync(distPath)) { const files = fs.readdirSync(distPath); console.log('Dist folder contents:', files); if (files.length > 0) { console.log('✅ Build successful!'); } else { console.log('❌ Build folder is empty'); process.exit(1); } } else { console.log('❌ Dist folder not found'); process.exit(1); }"
